name: Young Red Dragon

traits.name: Senses
traits.text: Blindsight 30 ft.; Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 18

text:
# Young Red Dragon

*Large Dragon (Chromatic), Chaotic Evil*

A young red dragon coming into its power: the most infamous of chromatic dragons — arrogant, avaricious, and wreathed in fire.

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

**Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6).** Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.
